🏰 Book your bouncy castle

Message us on WhatsApp to check dates and get booked in.

Palnackie and Dalbeattie only. We're unable to take bookings from outside these two villages.
💬

Get in touch to book

Send us a message on WhatsApp with your preferred date, the number of hours, and your address. We'll confirm availability and sort the rest.

Message us on WhatsApp

Before you book

  • Flat garden area of at least 5m × 5m
  • Vehicle access to the garden
  • Power socket within 25m
  • Adult supervision at all times
  • No shoes, sharp objects or food on the castle

Pricing

  • £40 per hour
  • 2 hours — £80
  • 3 hours — £120
  • 4 hours — £160
  • Pay by cash or payment link

Bouncy castle hire in Palnackie & Dalbeattie ✨
